title: Inter-Component Communication Map
description: Practical guide to choosing the correct communication boundary in modern OpenWrt: UCI for persistent config, ubus for runtime state and method calls, rpcd for privileged backend APIs, and LuCI as the browser-facing consumer.
when_to_use: Use when deciding where new logic belongs and how components should exchange data across browser, web server, backend services, and system daemons.
verification_basis: Verified against current luci, uhttpd, rpcd, netifd, procd, ubus, and ucode source checkouts under tmp/authoring-repos on 2026-03-28
